storyHook: 考试前焦虑，朋友鼓励，镇定上场

narrative.when: 周五早上，一小时后就要进考场
narrative.where: 甲家门口，出发去考试前
narrative.who: 甲（考生）· 乙（家人/朋友）
narrative.how: 甲说出心里的紧张，乙在旁边鼓励
narrative.method: 说出紧张的原因、复习要点、深呼吸放松、出发去考场
narrative.event: 甲这次考试很重要，担心自己复习得不够

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: I am so on edge.

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: What is wrong?

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: I have a test in one hour.
turns.zh: 我一小时后就要考试了。

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: You have been working hard.

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: I am not certain I will do well.

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: That is a normal feeling.

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: What if my memory is gone?

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: You will not. You are ready.

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: I have my notes here.

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: Good. Let us go through them.

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: I am still ill at heart.

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: That is all right. Have a look at the first line.

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: First part: the chief ideas.

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: Good. Now take a slow breath.

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: Take air in... out... That is better.

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: You see? You have it well.

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: I do, but my head is full of doubt.
turns.zh: 是，但我脑子里全是怀疑。

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: Doubt is only a sign you care.
turns.zh: 怀疑只是你在意的表现。

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: What if I have nothing in my head in the room?
turns.zh: 万一我在房间里脑子里什么都没了呢？

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: Then you take three slow breaths again.
turns.zh: 那你就再慢慢做三次深呼吸。

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: And if the words will not come?
turns.zh: 要是想不起来怎么说呢？

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: You have the key points on that paper.
turns.zh: 你那张纸上有关键要点。

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: True. I will keep it on my table.

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: And have some water now. It will help.
turns.zh: 现在喝点水。会有帮助的。

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: Right. One more breath, and I am ready.
turns.zh: 好。再吸一口气，我就准备好了。

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: Good. You look a bit better now.
turns.zh: 好。你现在看起来好一点了。

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: Yes, the water did help a bit.

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: Now, say the first point out loud.
turns.zh: 现在，把第一条大声说出来。

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: The first part of the first division.
turns.zh: 第一个部分的第一部分。

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: That is right. You have it clear.

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: And the second point? The hard one.
turns.zh: 那第二点呢？那个难的部分。

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: The rules for the long division.

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: Good. You see? It is all there.

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: I am more ready now, yes.
turns.zh: 我现在确实更有准备了，是的。

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: Then we go. Time to do this.
turns.zh: 那我们走吧。是时候上场了。

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: Good. Now, take a deep breath with me.
turns.zh: 好。现在，跟我一起深呼吸。

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: In for four, out for six. Like the slow bell.
turns.zh: 吸四秒，呼六秒。像慢钟声一样。

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: The stiff feeling is going.

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: That is the way. One more time, together.
turns.zh: 就是这样。再来一次，一起。

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: Better. Now, have some water before we go.
turns.zh: 好多了。现在，出发前喝点水。

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: Here, take this cup. It is warm, not cold.
turns.zh: 来，拿着这杯。是温的，不是凉的。

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: Thank you. My mouth was dry.

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: That is normal. The water will help your body.
turns.zh: 正常。水能让身体稳下来。

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: I still have a knot here, in my stomach.
turns.zh: 我这里还是有个结，在胃里。

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: That knot will go when you start writing.
turns.zh: 等你开始写，那个结就解开了。

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: Is that so? I hope you are right.
turns.zh: 你确定吗？希望你说得对。

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: I have been through this before. Take my word.

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: What if I see a question I do not have the answer to?
turns.zh: 万一碰到不会的题怎么办？

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: Then do another one. Come back after.
turns.zh: 那就先做另一题，回头再来。

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: Yes. Go past and come back. That is a good idea.

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: Right. Now say your notes out loud. That will keep them in your head.
turns.zh: 好了。现在把笔记大声说出来。这样就能记在脑子里。

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: I will have a go. 'Part three, chief points...'

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: Good. Your voice is getting stronger. Keep going.
turns.zh: 好。你的声音越来越稳了。继续。

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: I did it. I am a bit better now.
turns.zh: 念完了。现在感觉好一点了。

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: See? You are good at this. Now do it with me. In... keep... out.
turns.zh: 看吧？你擅长这个。现在跟我做。吸……屏住……呼。

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: In... keep... out. My chest is less tight.
turns.zh: 吸……屏住……呼。胸口没那么紧了。

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: One more time. In... keep... out. There. You are ready.
turns.zh: 再来一次。吸……屏住……呼。好了。你准备好了。

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: Let us go now? The sun is up and the air is clean.
turns.zh: 我们现在走吗？太阳出来了，空气很干净。

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: Yes. I have my pen and my ticket. Let us go.
turns.zh: 好。我带了笔和准考证。走吧。

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: That is the way. One step at a time. You have got this.
turns.zh: 这才像话。一步一步来。你行的。

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: Right. Now, one last thing. A drink of water.

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: Here. Not too cold. It will help your throat.

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: Thanks. My mouth was dry.

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: That is normal. Now, what is the first thing you will do?
turns.zh: 正常。现在，你进去第一件事做什么？

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: Look at the questions. All of them.

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: Good. Then what?

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: Do the ones I see first. Keep the hard ones for after.

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: Good. You have a way. That is a start.
turns.zh: 很好。你有办法了。这是个开始。

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: I will not let the time get to me.

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: That is the way. Now, let us go and do it.
turns.zh: 这才像话。走吧，去把它搞定。

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: Right. One more deep breath before we go.
turns.zh: 好。走之前再来一次深呼吸。

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: In through the nose, out through the mouth.

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: I am a bit better now.

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: Good. Your mind is clear. That is what you need.
turns.zh: 好。脑子清楚了。这就是你需要的。

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: What if I get a question I have not seen?
turns.zh: 要是碰到没见过的题怎么办？

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: Then take a breath and do what you can. No one has all the answers.
turns.zh: 那就吸口气，能做多少做多少。没人全知道。

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: You are right. I have done my best.
turns.zh: 你说得对。我已经尽力了。

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: And that is enough. Now, are you ready?
turns.zh: 那就够了。现在，准备好了吗？

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: Yes. Let us go.

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: That is right. I will be here when you come out.
turns.zh: 这才像样。我在这儿等你出来。

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: Let us go over the key points again.

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: Yes, that might help. Start with the first part.
turns.zh: 好，可能有帮助。从第一部分开始吧。

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: Right. The chief ideas are clear now.
turns.zh: 对。主要想法现在清楚了。

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: Good. Now take a slow breath in, and out.
turns.zh: 好。现在慢慢吸气，再呼出来。

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: I am a bit quieter after that.
turns.zh: 做完这个我感觉平静些了。

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: Have some water. It will keep your throat wet.

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: Thanks. My heart is slower now.

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: You have done your best. Be certain of that.
turns.zh: 你该做的都做了。相信自己。

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: I will keep that in mind.

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: That is the way. Now let us go.

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: I am ready now.

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: Good. Let us go to the test place.

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: I will do my best.

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: That is all a man can do.

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: The sun is bright today.

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: A good sign, I would say.

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: Yes, a good sign.

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: Keep your head up.

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: I will. Go after the test.

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: Talk then. Go on.

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: Right, off you go.

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: Thanks for being here.

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: That is what family does.

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: I will not let you down.

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: You will not let you down.

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: This pen is my good sign.

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: Good. Use it well.

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: I will take my time.

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: That is the way.

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: See you in two hours.

storyBlurb: 考前焦虑如潮水般涌来，朋友一句鼓励却成了定心丸。深呼吸后，他带着信心踏进考场。
storyScript:
【开场·承认紧张】清晨的阳光斜斜地照在门垫上，甲却无心欣赏。他攥着准考证，指节发白。一小时后就要进考场，可那些公式和定义像捉迷藏似的在脑海里躲闪。他低声对乙说：怕考不好，怕这几个月的努力白费。声音里带着一丝颤抖，像秋天最后一片叶子。乙没有打断，只是静静听着，眼神里满是理解。

【进行·鼓励准备】乙轻轻拍了拍甲的肩膀，说紧张很正常，说明在乎。然后从包里掏出一张纸条，上面是甲自己写的复习要点：重点章节的框架、易错题的提醒、还有那句“相信自己”。乙让他对着纸条念一遍，声音从微弱渐渐变得坚定。接着，乙示范起深呼吸：吸气四秒，屏住四秒，呼气六秒。甲跟着做，胸腔里的闷气一点点散开，像晨雾被阳光驱散。乙又递来一杯温水，说喝下去能稳住心跳。甲喝了一口，温热的液体顺着喉咙滑下，紧绷的神经松弛了些。

【收束·镇定出发】时间到了。甲站起身，把准考证小心地收进笔袋。乙帮他理了理衣领，笑着说：你复习了那么多遍，该会的都会了。甲深吸一口气，推开门。外面的空气带着青草味，阳光正好。他回头冲乙点点头，然后大步朝考场走去。脚步不再迟疑，背影里多了一份从容。他知道，无论结果如何，这一刻他已经准备好了。
